sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see that the center of the grid changed from green to white. The grid now has:
- Node 10: g (top-left)
- Node 11: W (top-center)
- Node 12: g (top-right)
- Node 18: W (middle-left)
- Node 19: g (center)
- Node 20: W (middle-right)
- Node 22: g (bottom-left)
- Node 23: W (bottom-center)
- Node 24: g (bottom-right)
So the center of the grid is now gray. The white squares are in a cross/plus pattern. The purple dots are still there.

So the pattern of white squares matches the pattern of purple dots. The center of the grid is gray. The white squares are in a cross/plus pattern.
